creator: eric@metrotv.com
text:
Attempting to install 3.2-RELEASE on a new machine.  Would like to install via the internet but am getting the following errors with the 3COM 3C900B-TPO card:

xl0:  <3Com 3c900B-TPO Etherlink XL> rev 0x04 int a irq 255 on pci 0.11.0
xl0:  couldn't map port
xl0:  WARNING:  this shouldn't happen!  Possible PCI support code bug!
xl0:  attempting to map iobase manuallycreate_intr: requested irq 255 to high, limit is 15
xl0:  couldn't map interrupt

How-To-Repeat: Try installing 3.2-RELEASE with the 3C900B-TPO card installed.
